flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Luther College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Luther College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.8k → $52.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Luther College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.8k → $52.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Luther College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
